# Concord Locksmith

> Family-owned locksmith in downtown Concord, California, operating since 1947. Licensed, bonded, and insured. Real storefront - not a dispatch call center.

## Key facts
- Business: Concord Locksmith
- Address: 1804 Colfax Street, Concord, CA 94520, USA
- Phone: (925) 689-1534
- Founded: 1947 (three generations, family-owned)
- Hours: Mon-Wed & Fri 8:30am-5pm, Thu 9:30am-5pm, Sat-Sun closed; after-hours emergency lockout service available by phone
- Service area: Concord and Contra Costa County, California
- Pricing policy: quote before work begins; no hidden fees
- Credentials: Licensed, bonded & insured; BBB accredited; Nextdoor Neighborhood Fave 2024; TWIC certified technicians

## Services
- [Residential locksmith](https://concordlock.com/services/residential): lockouts, rekeying, lock repair/replacement, smart locks, key duplication
- [Commercial locksmith](https://concordlock.com/services/commercial): master key systems, restricted keyways, card access control, panic hardware, property management support
- [Automotive locksmith](https://concordlock.com/services/automotive): car lockouts, transponder/laser-cut key cutting and programming, remote fobs, ignition repair
- [Safes](https://concordlock.com/services/safes): showroom sales (gun/fire/drop/home safes), delivery, installation, combination changes, safe opening with proof of ownership
- [Keyless entry](https://concordlock.com/services/keyless): keypad and smart lock installation and service for homes and businesses
- [Self defense products](https://concordlock.com/services/self-defense): pepper spray, stun guns, personal alarms sold in-store with guidance
